seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wellcamp and Wellesley Islands. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wellcamp vs Wellesley Islands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wellcamp and Wellesley Islands.
heading: Wellcamp vs Wellesley Islands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wellcamp, Queensland and Wellesley Islands, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wellesley Islands has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wellcamp (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wellcamp or Wellesley Islands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wellcamp has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Wellesley Islands scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wellcamp scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Wellesley Islands scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wellcamp or Wellesley Islands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wellesley Islands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
